zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Chrichton於1510年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd25歲，母親Elizabeth Lyon20歲。她於1527年3月與John Atkin在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年在英國英格蘭艾可維可享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Chrichton于1510年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd25岁，母亲Elizabeth Lyon20岁。她于1527年3月与John Atkin在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年在英国英格兰艾可維可享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chrichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Chrichton was born in 1510, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Lyon, was 20. She married John Atkin in March 1527, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1566, in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Chrichton est née en 1510, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lyon, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Atkin en mars 1527, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1566, à Wix, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Chrichton 1510 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lyon 20. Sie hat im März 1527 in England, United Kingdom John Atkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1566 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Chrichton è nata il nel 1510 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lyon, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Atkin nel marzo 1527, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1566, nel Wix, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Chrichtonが1510年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurdは25歳，母Elizabeth Lyonは20歳であった。1527年3月にイギリスイギリスでJohn Atkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィックスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Chrichton(이)가 1510년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lyon(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1527년 3월 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Atkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Chrichton nasceu em 1510, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lyon, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Atkin em março de 1527, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1566, em Wix, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Chrichton родилась в 1510 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lyon, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Atkin марта 1527 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1566 г. в местности викс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Chrichton nació en 1510, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Crichton of Innernytie, latterly Sthrathurd, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lyon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Atkin en marzo de 1527, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1566, en Wix, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
